Deepwater Harpoon  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 40
DMG: 18 Dmg Bonus: 142
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STA: +5 WIS: +5
WT: 13.0 Size: GIANT
Class: PAL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 40

Race: ALL

Item Type:2H Slashing

Source:Live

Page Updated:Thu May 4th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 339pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 40
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Sentry Xyrin

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Ocean of Tears


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
Origin of the Quest for Deepwater Harpoon
QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2018 at 1:04 AM Rating: Decent
Azadara
3 posts
The original Deepwater Harpoon Quest was given by a Paladin Guild Master in Erudin named: Weligon Steelherder and it was to stop the building of a bride from Qeynos to Erudin. Basically you had to find a list of Architects and hunt them down and bring the list and the three heads back to Weligon
▲ Page top
Origin of the Quest for Deepwater Harpoon
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2023 at 9:56 PM Rating: Good
PabstMonk
Scholar
17 posts
I believe you're referring to the Deep Six Cutlass, which was the quest reward for "The Bridge."
▲ Page top
I did this quest 4 times the other day
QuoteReply
# Jan 29 2003 at 2:49 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570705029
86 posts
The first time I just talked with Sentry Xyrinn (what boat accident?, what potion of marr?). She went up to stand next to the specs, never fought them and dropped this item before despawning. This could be done at level 1. The item was 18/40.
The third time I did this, I asked "what boat accident", then gave her the potion of marr. She despawned immediately and said something like "Thank you for the potion. I have been summoned elsewhere". She didn't leave anything behind and didn't fight the specs.
The second time I gave her the potion right away, but forgot to cast my faction modifier first so she said I hadn't helped the temple or marr enough. She did the same as the first attempt.
The fourth time I asked her both questions, then gave her the potion. She despawned again, said she was summoned and dropped nothing again.
When I returned the empty potion of marr to the the temple of marr I got the spell stun. So, to recap - give her the potion and you dont get the weapon. Just hail her and follow the verbal queues and you'll get it. Seems kinda backwards.
I did not try giving her the potion before hailing here. Not sure what that will do, but I assume she would despawn.
As for the stats, they were 18/40. Never saw 20/40. Perhaps you guys could post a link. Are you sure your not thinking of another item?
To make her spawn, just go to sister isle to the little hut by the docks (not the double hut). There is a woman inside named either "Paeonia Purnn" or "Phocaea Hapspenn"- I dont remember which. Tell her "Where is Sentry Xyrinn?". Good luck
-Ollex
▲ Page top
RE: I did this quest 4 times the other day
QuoteReply
# Apr 13 2006 at 6:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766938073
80 posts
Uhm ok a few questions:

1. How did you manage to do this with a Level 1 without attracting the Aggros of the Spectres without your Invis Vs Undead spell which is a Level 22 Paladin spell? (Unless you got it casted upon you)

2. How did you manage to avoid the gargoyles which frequently roam the area around there I am told?

I definately plan to take a little trip over there myself soon as I get my spell Instrument of Nife so in case my invis drops I can Nail the Specs with my Ghoulbane providing I long long enough to fight them 3 to 1 is it.
▲ Page top
RE: I did this quest 4 times the other day
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2006 at 5:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760228035
287 posts
specs agro a few secs after u run in ... and u stand afar and click on her ... when she's no longer on ur cursor u run in ... that's how to avoid gargoyles
▲ Page top

I think this is part of a Quest for Prexus, in Odus. Welligon Steelherder speaks of a deepwater harpoon.

QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2002 at 11:58 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592255864093
216 posts
Ummm, to all you Kunark Babies out there (ie: ppl who started post Kunark)
This is an old, old, old, OLD quest, its been in almost since day one, meant for paladins, it starts in Nfp where you speak to the sentries about one of their missing comrades.
Oh yea, and as for those who scream "This sucks"
20/40 owned back in the day, thx.

#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 07 2002 at 2:05 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) HOW IS IT 2HS AND CLR USABLE?!?!?!??!!?!??!?!?! AND IT SAYS BST ALSO! WTF?!?!?!?
RE: WTF?
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2002 at 2:20 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757958901
83 posts
Have to agree - this is a major FUBAR

Even Verant is confused now about why a harpoon is listed as a 2hs weapon when it should be pierce. And beastlord's can use pierce weapons.

Change the harpoon back to a pierce weapon.
▲ Page top
RE: WTF?
QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2018 at 12:58 AM Rating: Decent
Azadara
3 posts
ok I know you posted the message back in 2002

A Harpoon is a modified Halberd originally and a Halberd is a 2HS in reality. During the development and history of Weapons and sea Vessels many original weapons were alterations of existing weapons or Farm equipment. The first records of a Harpoon was a Halberd with a rope tied to it for fishing in sea water and large Lakes.

And a Halberd was originally a Pole Arm used to attack an enemy on a horse.

▲ Page top
RE: WTF?
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2002 at 5:13 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1692576997126
99 posts
someone had to goof - BL don't even have skills for 2HS - bad enuff we can use some 1HS weapons with no 1HS skill . . .
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Nov 01 2001 at 5:06 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) 1k in January, 1k now, either way, rip off.
RE: This thing sold for 1k?
QuoteReply
# Nov 26 2001 at 5:00 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
I usually avoid flames, but..

Damn, you're an idiot. Drakkel forged BS is not as good, nor BI. Even just looking at ratios and not stats. Mithril 2h is better, but do you have any idea what IT sold for last January. This is a VERY nice weapon for the price (not 1k now, closer to 250pp on my server). Keep in mind, there was a time people paid 100pp for a shiny brass halberd, and that is merchant fodder now. Apparently, the reason you "never bothered" to look up melee stuff, is that you don't play one. If you don't understand it, don't try to discuss it!

/flame off

Edit: Note, if you have the default filter on, you will not see the message I was replying to. Turn filter to "never filter" if you wish to see the post that prompted this response.



Edited, Mon Jan 14 11:38:22 2002

Arbitor's Combine Greatsword sells routinely for 1 to 2k on E'ci. Yes, one to two thousand platinum pieces. If I had the spare plat, I would buy all my paladins in the guild one of these. Btw, the paladin epic cannot be bought, and the stupidity of that post offends me.

This has been updated to pally only, but still has not only a good ration, but a WIS bonus to help mana as well ) not a bad weapon at all. I got mine at level 20 for 500pp
▲ Page top
RE: A cleric 2HS?
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 11:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Of course, by the time a cleric would have been able to get this, they would most likely have already quested a Testament of Vanear, or bought a charred guardian shield. No cleric I know would want to use both melee slots on an item with +5 wis. Especially since we have no slashing skills, and would therefore hardly ever hit with this. But I agree, as a pally weapon, looks pretty good.
